description: Send notifications to your own Nextcloud Talk destination through the UnitySVC gateway. POST the unified message envelope {title, body, type, format}; the gateway composes an Apprise nctalks:// URL from your stored secrets and delivers via apprise.unitysvc.dev. The free apprise channel uses your own stored credentials; the apprise-plus channel binds extra per-enrollment destinations via parameters. The gateway/gateway-plus transformer channels instead POST a native Nextcloud Talk chat message directly to your Nextcloud server's Talk API, bypassing Apprise.
name: msg-to-nextcloudtalk

request.template: {"urls":"nctalks://${ customer_secrets.NEXTCLOUDTALK_USER }:${ customer_secrets.NEXTCLOUDTALK_PASSWORD }@${ customer_secrets.NEXTCLOUDTALK_HOST }/${ customer_secrets.NEXTCLOUDTALK_TARGETS }","title":{* _escape_json(_body.title or "") *},"body":{* _escape_json(_body.body or "") *},"type":{* _escape_json(_body.type or "info") *},"format":{* _escape_json(_body.format or "text") *}}

{"urls":"nctalks://${ customer_secrets.{{ params.user_secret }} }:${ customer_secrets.{{ params.password_secret }} }@${ customer_secrets.{{ params.host_secret }} }/${ customer_secrets.{{ params.targets_secret }} }","title":{* _escape_json(_body.title or "") *},"body":{* _escape_json(_body.body or "") *},"type":{* _escape_json(_body.type or "info") *},"format":{* _escape_json(_body.format or "text") *}}
{"message":{* _escape_json((_body.title or "")..((_body.title or "")~="" and (_body.body or "")~="" and "\n" or "")..(_body.body or "")) *}}
{"message":{* _escape_json((_body.title or "")..((_body.title or "")~="" and (_body.body or "")~="" and "\n" or "")..(_body.body or "")) *}}
